title: EverythingCraft
description: A modpack with a little bit of everything for everyone.
body:
# GET YOUR OWN MINECRAFT SERVER
![CODE: BLU3 FOR 15% OF FIRST MONTH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f11e54f8aef120c2cad7b93953a2abdd20f3dad.png)
[Click here for the discount](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=330)

[My personal twitch account](https://www.twitch.tv/SolarisBlu3)

## Minecraft is open but can feel very restrictive in some areas. WELL NOT ANYMORE
**- MORE BUILDING BLOCKS**

**- MORE BIOMES**

**- MORE NETHER FORTRESS**

**- MORE MOB VARIANTS**

**- MORE EXPRESSIVE MOBS**

THE LIST GOES ON!!!

## What you can find

You can find new structures out in the wild along with new crops, new mobs, and maybe some forgotten ones.

Take on quests from villagers and earn rewards! make your tools look fancy, or maybe decorate your elytra!

the world is your oyster! or muscle on a sandy beach
